title: teucrium grisebachii
intro: Teucrium grisebachii, also known as Grisebach's germander, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Teucrium grisebachii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Teucrium grisebachii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
